profile.name: Shivaniben Patel
profile.title: .NET Developer
profile.bio: Experienced and passionate .NET Developer with over 8 years of proven success in building secure, high-performance applications in the banking, insurance, e-commerce, and digital experience management industries. Strong expertise in C#, ASP.NET Core, MVC, REST APIs, WCF, and modern JavaScript frameworks like Angular (v2–18). Specializes in full-stack development using .NET, Angular, and Azure to deliver scalable web applications and enterprise solutions. Experienced with GitHub Copilot and AI-assisted development workflows. Thrives in Agile environments and enjoys translating complex business requirements into elegant, user-friendly solutions.

bullets: Collaborated with business stakeholders to translate requirements into functional and technical specifications using Agile/Scrum methodologies.
Designed and developed scalable backend services using ASP.NET Core 6/8, C#, and RESTful Web APIs for financial transaction matching and reconciliation.
Integrated AI-assisted development workflows using GitHub Copilot and LLMs to accelerate code generation, refactoring, documentation, and unit test creation.
Architected microservices-based solutions using ASP.NET Core Web API, Entity Framework Core (Code-First), and SQL Server 2022.
Built intelligent reconciliation workflows integrating BlackLine and ReconNet with automated validation and rule-based processing logic.
Built responsive frontend applications using Angular 15–18, TypeScript, Bootstrap, HTML5, and CSS3 with signal-based reactivity and deferred loading.
Designed secure authentication/authorization using ASP.NET Core Identity and JWT tokens with role-based access control.
Implemented PCI-DSS compliant solutions with encryption, secure key management, and protected API endpoints.
Migrated legacy applications from IaaS to Azure PaaS services (App Services, Worker Roles, Azure SQL) for improved scalability.
Containerized applications using Docker and supported CI/CD pipelines via TFS, Jenkins, and Azure DevOps.
Configured batch workflows and job scheduling using Control-M to enhance transaction processing efficiency.
Implemented WCF-to-REST modernization strategies, replacing SOAP services with ASP.NET Core Web APIs.
Utilized Agile methodologies for rapid development, continuous delivery, and regular adaptation to varying requirements.
Built Single Page Applications (SPAs) using Angular 16, TypeScript, HTML5, and SCSS with Angular Material components.
Achieved backend development using ASP.NET Core MVC, creating partial views, reusable components, and business rules in C#.
Secured APIs using JWT Tokens for ASP.NET Core Web APIs and implemented global-level authentication in Web API 2.
Modernized legacy systems by converting applications from IaaS to Azure PaaS using Windows Azure Worker Roles.
Utilized RxJS and Angular services to manage asynchronous data flows, observables, and real-time data updates.
Managed distributed version control using Git with experience in rebasing, feature branches, and merging.
Deployed .NET applications across Dev, Validation, UAT, and Production environments using IIS.
Developed CRUD components and services using TypeScript in Angular 9/10 architecture.
Built user interface with ASP.NET Core and implemented business logic using C# MVC controllers.
Implemented RESTful Web APIs using ASP.NET Web API and integrated Entity Framework Code First for the Data Access Layer.
Created Azure Queue-based web applications running on Windows Azure and SQL Azure.
Designed and developed Web APIs, WCF, and web services for cross-platform integrations.
Improved SSRS reports and displayed Table, List, and Matrix reports on ASP.NET Web Forms.
Increased data quality using robust error handling and logging mechanisms in SSIS packages.
Utilized N-Unit and XUnit frameworks to implement unit and integration test cases.
Maintained and extended architecture built on .NET Framework 4.8, C#, Entity Framework, and Angular 6/8.
Implemented WCF services layer on Windows Azure with SQL Azure Content Gateway between the database and online content.
Provided WCF services through IIS following Service-Oriented Architecture (SOA) principles.
Applied WCF throttling and concurrency to increase throughput of web services.
Implemented drill-down functionality in SSRS reports for navigation from summary to detailed data.
Utilized ADO.NET Entity Framework extensively for retrieving, querying, storing, and manipulating data.
Developed databases, views, stored procedures, and T-SQL statements following SQL Server best practices.
Utilized NUnit to develop unit testing scenarios for Business and Service classes.
Implemented presentation, business component, and database access layers for ASP.NET 4.8 and C# Web Forms.
Used Angular's $http service to invoke Web API RESTful services and set up projects using Angular CLI.
Implemented JSON-based authentication for ASP.NET applications using .NET Framework, MVC, and IIS security models.
Created reusable C# class libraries and developed business logic for multi-threaded applications.
Created T-SQL views and stored procedures as needed for SQL Server data access.
Managed versioning, project tracking, and reporting using Team Foundation Server (TFS).

projects.name: Banking Transaction Reconciliation System
projects.description: Modern banking application integrating financial transaction matching and reconciliation using .NET Core, Angular 15–18, and Azure. Features microservices architecture, PCI-DSS compliance, and AI-assisted development with GitHub Copilot.

projects.name: Insurance SPA Modernization
projects.description: Modernized legacy insurance infrastructure with Angular 16 SPAs and ASP.NET Core MVC APIs. Migrated from IaaS to Azure PaaS reducing infrastructure costs by 30%.

projects.name: E-Commerce Platform
projects.description: Full-stack e-commerce application with Azure-based infrastructure, SSRS reporting, REST APIs, WCF services, and Azure Queues for streamlined operations.

projects.name: Insurance Systems Platform
projects.description: Insurance management systems built on .NET Framework 4.8 with WCF services on Azure, SOA architecture, SSRS drill-down reporting, and optimized T-SQL performance.

projects.name: Banking Web Application
projects.description: ASP.NET Web Forms and MVC application with reusable C# class libraries, Angular 4 responsive UI, JSON-based authentication, and TFS-managed source control.
